records.ety: [L. inhaerere; pref. in- in + haerere to stick, hang. See Hesitate.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Inhered (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Inhering.]

defs: To be inherent; to stick (in); to be fixed in or permanently incorporated with something; to cleave (to); to belong, as attributes or qualities.
quotes: They do but inhere in the subject that supports them.
